message.content:
在 d:\UE_Projects\LFP2D 项目中，搜索与战斗胜利判定相关的代码。具体需要找到：
1. 判断"所有敌人被击败"从而触发胜利结算的逻辑在哪里
2. 背叛系统（Betrayal）触发时的处理逻辑，特别是单位阵营变更时的代码
3. 单位死亡（OnDeath）时的处理流程

重点关注 TurnManager、BetrayalManager、TacticsUnit 中的相关代码。请返回所有相关代码片段及其文件路径和行号。

content.text: 我来帮你搜索战斗胜利判定、背叛系统和单位死亡处理的相关代码。

   281→    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit Stats")
   282→    EUnitAffiliation Affiliation = EUnitAffiliation::UA_Player;
   283→
   284→    // ==== 单位身份 ====
   285→
   286→    // 单位类型 ID（对应 ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset 中的键）
   287→    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit Identity")
   288→    FName UnitTypeID = NAME_None;
   289→
   290→    // 单位阶级
   291→    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit Identity")
   292→    int32 UnitTier = 1;
   293→
   294→    // 生成轻量单位数据（用于捕获、保存）
   295→    FLFPUnitEntry ToUnitEntry() const
   296→    {
   297→        FLFPUnitEntry Entry;
   298→        Entry.TypeID = UnitTypeID;
   299→        Entry.Tier = UnitTier;
   300→        return Entry;
   301→    }
   302→
   303→    // ==== 战斗相关 ====
   304→
   305→    // 应用伤害
   306→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Unit Combat")
   307→    void TakeDamage(int32 Damage);
   308→
   309→    // 治疗单位
   310→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Unit Combat")
   311→    void Heal(int32 Amount);
   312→
   313→    // 检查是否存活
   314→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   315→    bool IsAlive() const { return CurrentHealth > 0; }
   316→
   317→    // 检查是否为敌方单位
   318→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   319→    bool IsEnemy() const { return Affiliation == EUnitAffiliation::UA_Enemy; }
   320→
   321→    // 检查是否为友方单位
   322→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   323→    bool IsAlly() const { return Affiliation == EUnitAffiliation::UA_Player; }
   324→
   325→    // 检查是否为中立单位
   326→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   327→    bool IsNeutral() const { return Affiliation == EUnitAffiliation::UA_Neutral; }
   328→
   329→    // 攻击目标单位
   330→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Unit Combat")
   331→    bool AttackTarget(ALFPTacticsUnit* Target);
   332→
   333→    void ApplyDamageToTarget(ALFPTacticsUnit* Target);
   334→
   335→    // 死亡处理
   336→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintImplementableEvent, Category = "Unit Combat")
   337→    void OnDeath();
   338→
   339→    // 受伤处理
   340→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintImplementableEvent, Category = "Unit Combat")
   341→    void OnTakeDamage(int32 DamageTaken);
   342→
   343→    // 治疗处理
   344→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintImplementableEvent, Category = "Unit Combat")
   345→    void OnHeal(int32 HealAmount);
   346→
   347→    // 播放攻击动画
   348→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintImplementableEvent, Category = "Unit Combat")
   349→    void PlayAttackAnimation(ALFPTacticsUnit* Target);
   350→
   351→    // 获取攻击范围
   352→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Unit Combat")
   353→    TArray<ALFPHexTile*> GetAttackRangeTiles();
   354→
   355→    // 获取攻击范围大小
   356→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Unit Combat")
   357→    int32 GetAttackRange() { return AttackRange; }
   358→
   359→    // 检查目标是否在攻击范围内
   360→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   361→    bool IsTargetInAttackRange(ALFPTacticsUnit* Target) const;
   362→
   363→    // 阵营颜色
   364→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Display")
   365→    FLinearColor GetAffiliationColor() const;
   366→
   367→    void UpdateHealthUI();
   368→
   369→protected:
   370→    // 处理死亡
   371→    void HandleDeath();
   372→
   373→    // 攻击范围
   374→    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, Category = "Unit Combat")
   375→    int32 AttackRange = 2;
   376→
   377→    // 近战攻击模式
   378→    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, Category = "Unit Combat")
   379→    bool bMeleeAttack = true;
   380→
   381→    // 死亡状态
   382→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Unit State", meta = (AllowPrivateAccess = "true"))
   383→    bool bIsDead = false;
   384→
   385→public:
   386→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Betrayal")
   387→    void ChangeAffiliation(EUnitAffiliation NewAffiliation = EUnitAffiliation::UA_Player);
   388→
   389→protected:
   390→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Betrayal")
   391→	TArray<ULFPBetrayalCondition*> BetrayalConditions;
   392→
   393→    // 敌方AI控制器支持和事件
   394→public:
   395→    // 获取AI控制器
   396→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "AI")
   397→    ALFPAIController* GetAIController() const { return AIController; }
   398→
   399→    //// 事件：移动完成
   400→    //UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Events")
   401→    //FSimpleMulticastDelegate OnMoveCompleteDelegate;
   402→
   403→    //// 事件：攻击完成
   404→    //UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Events")
   405→    //FSimpleMulticastDelegate OnAttackCompleteDelegate;
   406→
   407→    //// 在移动完成后触发事件
   408→    //UFUNCTION()
   409→    //void NotifyMoveComplete()
   410→    //{
   411→    //    OnMoveCompleteDelegate.Broadcast();
   412→    //}
   413→
   414→    //// 在攻击完成后触发事件
   415→    //UFUNCTION()
   416→    //void NotifyAttackComplete()
   417→    //{
   418→    //    OnAttackCompleteDelegate.Broadcast();
   419→    //}
   420→
   421→protected:
   422→    // AI控制器
   423→    UPROPERTY()
   424→    ALFPAIController* AIController;
   425→
   426→public:
   427→    // 寻找最佳目标
   428→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "AI")
   429→    virtual ALFPTacticsUnit* FindBestTarget();
   430→
   431→    // 寻找最佳移动位置
   432→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "AI")
   433→    virtual ALFPHexTile* FindBestMovementTile(ALFPTacticsUnit* Target);
   434→
   435→    // 计算威胁值
   436→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "AI")
   437→    virtual float CalculateThreatValue(ALFPTacticsUnit* Target);
   438→
   439→    // 计算位置价值
   440→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "AI")
   441→    virtual float CalculatePositionValue(ALFPHexTile* Tile, ALFPTacticsUnit* Target);
   442→
   443→public:
   444→    TArray<ULFPSkillBase*> GetAvailableSkills();
   445→
   446→    bool ExecuteSkill(ULFPSkillBase* Skill, ALFPHexTile* NewTargetTile = nullptr);
   447→
   448→    ULFPSkillBase* GetDefaultAttackSkill();
   449→
   450→public:
   451→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
   452→    TObjectPtr<ULFPSkillComponent> SkillComponent;
   453→
   454→    // ==== 行动计划（敌人规划阶段使用） ====
   455→public:
   456→    // 当前行动计划
   457→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
   458→    FEnemyActionPlan CurrentActionPlan;
   459→
   460→    // 设置行动计划并显示头顶图标
   461→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "AI Plan")
   462→    void SetActionPlan(const FEnemyActionPlan& Plan);
   463→
   464→    // 清除行动计划并隐藏图标
   465→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "AI Plan")
   466→    void ClearActionPlan();
   467→
   468→    // 是否有有效的行动计划
   469→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "AI Plan")
   470→    bool HasActionPlan() const { return CurrentActionPlan.bIsValid; }
   471→
   472→    // 显示/隐藏头顶技能图标
   473→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "AI Plan")
   474→    void ShowPlannedSkillIcon(bool bShow);
   475→
   476→protected:
   477→    // 头顶计划技能图标组件
   478→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
   479→    class UWidgetComponent* PlannedSkillIconComponent;
   480→
   481→    // 技能图标 Widget 蓝图类
   482→    UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
   483→    TSubclassOf<class ULFPPlannedSkillIconWidget> PlannedSkillIconWidgetClass;
   484→
   485→	// 技能图标距头顶距离
   486→	UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
   487→    float SkillIconTopDist = 100.f;
   488→};
   489→

content.text: 现在让我查看背叛条件的具体实现：

content.content:
1→// Fill out your copyright notice in the Description page of Project Settings.
     2→
     3→#pragma once
     4→
     5→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     6→#include "LFP2D/Unit/Betrayal/LFPBetrayalCondition.h"
     7→#include "LFP2D/Unit/LFPTacticsUnit.h"
     8→#include "LFPBCondition_HPLack.generated.h"
     9→
    10→/**
    11→ * 
    12→ */
    13→UCLASS()
    14→class LFP2D_API ULFPBCondition_HPLack : public ULFPBetrayalCondition
    15→{
    16→	GENERATED_BODY()
    17→
    18→public:
    19→	virtual bool CheckCondition_Implementation(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit) override
    20→	{
    21→		return Unit && Unit->GetCurrentHealth() <= HealthThreshold;
    22→	}
    23→
    24→private:
    25→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, Category = "Condition")
    26→	int32 HealthThreshold = 3;
    27→};
    28→

content.text: 现在让我查看 LFPBattleTypes 以了解共享类型定义：

content.content:
1→// Fill out your copyright notice in the Description page of Project Settings.
     2→
     3→#pragma once
     4→
     5→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     6→#include "LFPBattleTypes.generated.h"
     7→
     8→class ALFPTacticsUnit;
     9→class ULFPSkillBase;
    10→class ALFPHexTile;
    11→
    12→// 单位阵营枚举（从 LFPTacticsUnit.h 迁移至此，供多个系统使用）
    13→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    14→enum class EUnitAffiliation : uint8
    15→{
    16→	UA_Player     UMETA(DisplayName = "Player"),
    17→	UA_Enemy      UMETA(DisplayName = "Enemy"),
    18→	UA_Neutral    UMETA(DisplayName = "Neutral")
    19→};
    20→
    21→// 战斗阶段枚举
    22→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    23→enum class EBattlePhase : uint8
    24→{
    25→	BP_Deployment      UMETA(DisplayName = "Deployment"),
    26→	BP_EnemyPlanning   UMETA(DisplayName = "Enemy Planning"),
    27→	BP_ActionPhase     UMETA(DisplayName = "Action Phase"),
    28→	BP_RoundEnd        UMETA(DisplayName = "Round End")
    29→};
    30→
    31→// 地形类型枚举
    32→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    33→enum class ELFPTerrainType : uint8
    34→{
    35→	TT_Grass   UMETA(DisplayName = "草地"),
    36→	TT_Sand    UMETA(DisplayName = "沙地"),
    37→	TT_Dirt    UMETA(DisplayName = "泥地"),
    38→	TT_Stone   UMETA(DisplayName = "石地"),
    39→	TT_Snow    UMETA(DisplayName = "雪地"),
    40→	TT_Water   UMETA(DisplayName = "水域"),
    41→	TT_Lava    UMETA(DisplayName = "熔岩"),
    42→	TT_Magic   UMETA(DisplayName = "魔法"),
    43→	TT_Bridge  UMETA(DisplayName = "桥")
    44→};
    45→
    46→// 敌人行动计划结构体
    47→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    48→struct FEnemyActionPlan
    49→{
    50→	GENERATED_BODY()
    51→
    52→	// 执行计划的敌方单位
    53→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    54→	ALFPTacticsUnit* EnemyUnit = nullptr;
    55→
    56→	// 选定的技能
    57→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    58→	ULFPSkillBase* PlannedSkill = nullptr;
    59→
    60→	// 目标单位（可能在行动前死亡）
    61→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    62→	ALFPTacticsUnit* TargetUnit = nullptr;
    63→
    64→	// 技能瞄准的格子（= 目标单位规划时所在格子）
    65→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    66→	ALFPHexTile* TargetTile = nullptr;
    67→
    68→	// 敌人移动到的施法位置
    69→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    70→	ALFPHexTile* CasterPositionTile = nullptr;
    71→
    72→	// 技能生效范围内的格子（绝对位置）
    73→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    74→	TArray<ALFPHexTile*> EffectAreaTiles;
    75→
    76→	// 计划是否有效
    77→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "AI Plan")
    78→	bool bIsValid = false;
    79→
    80→	void Reset()
    81→	{
    82→		EnemyUnit = nullptr;
    83→		PlannedSkill = nullptr;
    84→		TargetUnit = nullptr;
    85→		TargetTile = nullptr;
    86→		CasterPositionTile = nullptr;
    87→		EffectAreaTiles.Empty();
    88→		bIsValid = false;
    89→	}
    90→};
    91→
